name: Abernathy, George Elmer
description: He is one of our men of experience. He is married and has had experience as mine foreman in Old Mexico. He is one of the old reliable sort, and will make good in after years.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is one of our men of experience. He is married and has had experience as mine foreman in Old Mexico. He is one of the old reliable sort, and will make good in after years.

name: Boucher, Leonidas James
description: He has fussed the girls from Lebanon to St. James. He is a strong advocate of the good roads movement in Phelps County, and the author of "Motoring in the Ozarks." He is in for everything. It is rumored that he will leave for Los Angeles the day after Commencement.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He has fussed the girls from Lebanon to St. James. He is a strong advocate of the good roads movement in Phelps County, and the author of "Motoring in the Ozarks." He is in for everything. It is rumored that he will leave for Los Angeles the day after Commencement.

name: Cepeda, Miguel Leon
description: "Speedy" is not as fast as his name indicates, but was fast enough to amuse the fellows on the Junior Trip. He did the Spanish fandango, and insisted that his straw hat was "isolated" instead of "insulated." Though things come slowly to him, he is like the fabled tortoise, and is liable to pass some of the faster men in the long run.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Speedy" is not as fast as his name indicates, but was fast enough to amuse the fellows on the Junior Trip. He did the Spanish fandango, and insisted that his straw hat was "isolated" instead of "insulated." Though things come slowly to him, he is like the fabled tortoise, and is liable to pass some of the faster men in the long run.

name: Collins, Lawrence
description: "Mike" is famous for his short speeches, his smile, and his interpretation of the Shakespearean Drama. He was presented with a gold watch by the football team the night of the Football Banquet, in appreciation of his efficient work as Athletic Manager.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Mike" is famous for his short speeches, his smile, and his interpretation of the Shakespearean Drama. He was presented with a gold watch by the football team the night of the Football Banquet, in appreciation of his efficient work as Athletic Manager.

name: Cowman, Gerard Hoopes
description: "Jerry" is with us again after several months of practical experience out west, and needless to say we are glad to get him back. He is a "speed merchant" of an exceptional type, and put us on the map in Track at St. Louis last Spring. When it comes to doing impromptu tailoring work on Ore Dressing belts, he prefers to plead "Not Guilty."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Jerry" is with us again after several months of practical experience out west, and needless to say we are glad to get him back. He is a "speed merchant" of an exceptional type, and put us on the map in Track at St. Louis last Spring. When it comes to doing impromptu tailoring work on Ore Dressing belts, he prefers to plead "Not Guilty."

name: Cushwa, Claude Calvin
description: "Cush" is a native son of Independence and he wears an independent air. A man of rare ability, he has proven himself a stone wall of defense in the line, and at the same time maintained a Tau Beta Pi standing, all of which has not seriously interfered with his reading all the latest novels and indulging in numerous "Amorous Adventures." If you wish to retain his friendship, never approach him with "Claudie."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Cush" is a native son of Independence and he wears an independent air. A man of rare ability, he has proven himself a stone wall of defense in the line, and at the same time maintained a Tau Beta Pi standing, all of which has not seriously interfered with his reading all the latest novels and indulging in numerous "Amorous Adventures." If you wish to retain his friendship, never approach him with "Claudie."

name: Downing, Clyde Virgil
description: He takes his time about everything, but the habits of the school teacher cling to him still. He is usually right when he makes a statement. Downing, Jr., bids fair to follow in Dad's footsteps, and be a famous Mining Engineer.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He takes his time about everything, but the habits of the school teacher cling to him still. He is usually right when he makes a statement. Downing, Jr., bids fair to follow in Dad's footsteps, and be a famous Mining Engineer.

name: Finagin, Joseph Cooper, Jr.
description: He is the third of the married contingent of our class and like Downing and Abernathy boasts of a youngster. Besides having attempted to annihilate the man who "sassed" Garrett at the St. Louis University game in 1912, he has also tried on various occasions to organize and perfect the Mining Association. He dislikes having his accuracy with the slide rule questioned, and really doesn't care to be called a "good guesser" in Electrical Machinery. As a photographer he has long since graduated from the amateur class, and his photos of school events will bring back fond memories to all of us in after years.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

As a photographer he has long since graduated from the amateur class, and his photos of school events will bring back fond memories to all of us in after years.

name: Goldsborough, Thaddeus Reamy
description: Hailing from Washington, D. C., comes a man whose jaws never grow tired of masticating the luscious gum. No wonder that receives a perfect grade in quizzes on the jaw type of crushers. He is a man of many schools and many accomplishments, and the better you know him the better you realize his abilities. He and Finagin were the "Guns" in Electrical Machinery, but he is also a "shark" in everything else. In his hands the slide rule can do anything but lie down and roll over, and he says he is confident he can make it do this with a little practice.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Hall, Clyde Willis
description: He hails from Kansas, and is not ashamed to admit it. He loves the dear old State, but says "salt mining" is not his line. He is not "afraid to come home in the dark," and thinks nothing of walking a couple of miles if there is a pretty girl at the other end. If Baron Munchhausen were alive he would certainly have to look to his laurels, for Bill has the ability to put them over with the most innocent and serious countenance.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

He is not "afraid to come home in the dark," and thinks nothing of walking a couple of miles if there is a pretty girl at the other end. If Baron Munchhausen were alive he would certainly have to look to his laurels, for Bill has the ability to put them over with the most innocent and serious countenance.

name: Halsey, Howard Gove
description: "Gove" has a craving for society, and is indeed a most gregarious animal. Has an ambition to be a hero (capital H, please,) but says he is always hampered by "Mose" being in the way. Has an insatiable appetite for magazines, and even two drugstores and the Post Office are unable to keep him supplied. He is one of those quiet, unobtrusive fellows, always ready to shoulder his share of the work, and is sure to do it to the best of his ability.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

He is one of those quiet, unobtrusive fellows, always ready to shoulder his share of the work, and is sure to do it to the best of his ability.

name: Hatch, Sidney Raymond
description: "Senator" will always be remembered for his "speed" during his Freshman and Sophomore years. As Professor Harris says, "Knowing Mr. Hatch as well as I do, I know that he has not studied the assignment." He doesn't like to have the Barbs called a "machine." The only man of whom "Doc Lewie" kept a complete diary. "Senator" has will-power out of the ordinary, and some day it will serve him in good stead.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

As Professor Harris says, "Knowing Mr. Hatch as well as I do, I know that he has not studied the assignment." He doesn't like to have the Barbs called a "machine." The only man of whom "Doc Lewie" kept a complete diary. "Senator" has will-power out of the ordinary, and some day it will serve him in good stead.

name: Hogoboom, William Coryell
description: "Bill" believes in versatility. In other words a man must be a scholar, a bum, a society leader, fresh air crank, faddist, and everything else, according to "Bill". This prime mustache raiser was born in Wahoo, Nebraska. Only to his intimate friends does he impart the mystic meaning of the name of his birthplace, for 'tis far too sacred for the "Hoi Polloi." "Bill" is a "gun" in everything, and "double barreled" in some things.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

"Bill" is a "gun" in everything, and "double barreled" in some things.

name: Kelly, Mervin Joe
description: "Kelly" is a demon for work. The mysteries of "Modern Business" have no terrors for him. He does everything well and slights nothing, not even his fussing, in which he is as regular and conscientious as in his school work. He seconds Professor Gottschalk in speed of articulation, and we are of the opinion that he thinks even faster than he talks. He dislikes being chided for his extreme youth, and in a moment of confidence admitted that he could grow a mustache if he had the time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

He dislikes being chided for his extreme youth, and in a moment of confidence admitted that he could grow a mustache if he had the time.

name: Llewellyn, Lodwick.
description: "Ole" is popularly thought of as a son of Sweden, although we have it on good authority that he comes from Wales. His ancestors came from Penryddlceyn, which accounts for his slow and easy-going ways. We believe him to be the possessor of more "M's" than any man that has ever graduated from M.S.M., and he deserves them all. Ole refuses to be "kidded" and is strictly "non-partisan." He is of exemplary habits, and is the sort we like to have with us.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

He is of exemplary habits, and is the sort we like to have with us.

name: McBride, Roy Nicoll
description: "Mac" came to us from the New Mexico School of Mines. He has had more experience and seen more of the world than most of us ever will. His smile is a thing of beauty and a joy forever. He is a lover of merry anecdotes, and has an inexhaustible fund of clever tales himself. He is famous for his deep-seated love for Calculus.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Mac" came to us from the New Mexico School of Mines. He has had more experience and seen more of the world than most of us ever will. His smile is a thing of beauty and a joy forever. He is a lover of merry anecdotes, and has an inexhaustible fund of clever tales himself. He is famous for his deep-seated love for Calculus.

name: Gilbert, Frank Metz
description: "Shorty" is famous for originating that saying "That's right, you're wrong!" His knowledge of the anatomy of steam boilers is a rare and wonderful thing, and he talks learnedly of the Keokuk Dam, High Tension Currents, Capacities, and other weird subjects much too deep for anyone save himself and "Doc" McRae. He has a rapid action smile, which almost approaches a grin, and his ability as a raconteur is not to be despised. No matter what turns up, Shorty can always be counted on.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

He has a rapid action smile, which almost approaches a grin, and his ability as a raconteur is not to be despised. No matter what turns up, Shorty can always be counted on.

name: Miller, Julius Charles Jr.
description: While "Eggie's" heart may be in the keeping of some fair maiden, he knows how to retain possession of his head at all times. He has contributed in no small degree to M.S.M.'s reputation in athletics. As a high pressure mill designer he has no equal, and thirty minutes is his record for a complete set of mill plans. He is one of the "rough and ready" sort, but underneath it all has a heart equal to the best, and is the kind we like to meet.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

He is one of the "rough and ready" sort, but underneath it all has a heart equal to the best, and is the kind we like to meet.

name: Moses, Frederick Galloway
description: "Freddie" has had practical experience at Cobalt and Garfield, and says he expects to "tramp" mine for three or four years. Mose is a strong believer in the "intellectual atmosphere," and thinks it advisable to fuss wherever he can best absorb it. "Me and Halsey," is his pet expression, and they are always to be found together. He is a hard worker, and always produces the goods.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Neal, Orion Dexter
major: Chemistry and Metallurgy, A.B. Indiana University
description: "Dexter" is with us from "Old Indiana," and brings with him a knowledge of much chemistry and a remarkable ability in the art of coaxing the shy and tender mustache out to the light of day. He is the only man who has ever equaled the "Czar's" hirsute adornment, and according to some (those partial to Titian Red) he has even surpassed it. He is famous for the "Transportation Company" which he and Beeghly organized, and for the judgment he displayed in dropping Electrical Machinery at the end of the first semester. His researches into the art of Oil Flotation, while not exactly agreeable to "Doc" Thornberry, are sure to be productive of valuable results. We wish him the best of success.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Needles, Enoch Ray
description: "Enoch," as is plainly seen from the imposing list of activities and honors to his credit, is a man of versatility. Never radical but always firm and fair in his beliefs, his impartiality and fairness in everything have made him one of the best liked men in school. Has never lost his head, but speaking of his heart—. Judging from his successes during his school career we can safely predict a successful future for "Enoch."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

name: Robson, Thomas C.
clubs: Laborero de Minas y Beneficiada de Metales, 1909, from L'Escuela de Minas de la Universidad de Potosi, Bolivia
El Capitan del Association Football y Gym. Team at Potosi
Protector of Cepeda on the Junior Trip
description: "Robby" is a versatile and widely accomplished man. The list of his varied activities and degrees reads like a page from Don Quixote, and only a native son of Spain could make head or tail out of them. He entered here as a Sophomore from Columbia. He is a good worker and a good fellow, and his eyes shine like diamonds when the word "girl" is mentioned.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

The list of his varied activities and degrees reads like a page from Don Quixote, and only a native son of Spain could make head or tail out of them. He entered here as a Sophomore from Columbia. He is a good worker and a good fellow, and his eyes shine like diamonds when the word "girl" is mentioned.

name: Simrall, Riley Marsh
description: "Riley" hails from William Jewell. Though from a Theological School to a Miners School is quite a change, Riley is trying his best to live up to the changed conditions. His favorite occupation is punching holes in a granite block, trying to see which is the harder, the drill or the granite. He is famous for the "black eye" which he gave Rolla's so called "four hundred." "Too big a man for school politics." Taken all in all, Old Erin has good cause to be proud of him, her foremost representative at M.S.M.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Taken all in all, Old Erin has good cause to be proud of him, her foremost representative at M.S.M.

name: Smith, Clinton D.
description: "Seedy" comes from the North, and many think that he is as cold as the winds that blow from there, but in reality his heart beats warm under the frigid exterior. Has been making an intensive study of the methods of operating the modern hotel, some think with a view of buying or otherwise acquiring one when he graduates. Though his quota of the "midnight oil" is rather a small one, Seedy always manages to stand well up in the class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Though his quota of the "midnight oil" is rather a small one, Seedy always manages to stand well up in the class.

name: Stoliker, Edmond Otis
description: “Stolly” came to us from Des Moines College, with a “reputation” as a football player, and has more than lived up to it. His unfortunate injury in the Washington Game was regretted by every one of us. Besides his loss of strength and loss of time in school, his confinement lost him his heart. Here's hoping he will soon be in good shape again. “This is a NON—fraternity meeting!”
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

His unfortunate injury in the Washington Game was regretted by every one of us. Besides his loss of strength and loss of time in school, his confinement lost him his heart. Here's hoping he will soon be in good shape again. “This is a NON—fraternity meeting!”

name: Thomas, Thomas Rae
description: “Shorty” has always been an ardent advocate of the “charms of music to soothe the savage breast,” and was prone to break out with a barbershop tenor whenever he heard the tuneful strains of the latest popular song. When it came to fussing, Shorty brooked no rivals for first honors, and it was no unusual sight to see him strolling up Rolla's main street with three fair damsels in tow. Was always the life of every occasion at which he was present, and could be counted on to enliven all the dull moments.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

Was always the life of every occasion at which he was present, and could be counted on to enliven all the dull moments.

name: Truex, Arthur Fuller
major: Mining Engineering, B.S., University of Rochester, 1908
description: "True" has the happy faculty of making everything he enters into a success. He will long be remembered for his impersonation of St. Pat, our Patron Saint, and the introduction of the wild and wicked Cabaret Show to our annual banquets. He was persona non grata for several weeks after the Football Banquet, to the married women of Rolla, for they held him responsible for their husbands' misdemeanors on that memorable occasion. His accomplishments are without number, and he is always willing to make use of them in any way for the good of the school.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology

His accomplishments are without number, and he is always willing to make use of them in any way for the good of the school.

name: Wager, Walter Henry
description: He and his corn cob pipe are inseparable. Has been known in all seriousness to claim that the "Neosho Times" is a much better paper than the "St. Louis Republic," and proves his loyalty by reading it on any and every occasion. His nervousness is truly remarkable, and he has been known to jump at least twenty feet from a standing start when sufficiently startled. He is the school's Mineralogy "Shark," and has even been known to distinguish various rocks in the dark, using his sense of touch alone. "Wag-ger" will be missed by all of us.
